** 	READ 	THIS 	FIRST 	**
From: Todd Brown
West Palm Beach, Florida
Dear Marketing Funnel Superstar,
So... you really are serious about joining the ranks of multi-millionaire
marketers, huh?
I know you are... because... you’re here. Reading this. Now.
And that’s good. Because with your subscription to Marketing Funnels
Uncensored (MFU) you’re now part of an exclusive group of entrepreneurs who are
truly going to the get the keys to the castle.
You see, as an MFU Member you get never-given-before access to the behind-
the-scenes stuff going down with the...
Biggest, Baddest, Most Profitable
Marketing Funnels Under The Sun!
You’re going to see stuff - laid out bare for you - that other marketers have
only dreamed of getting their hands on. 	But never will.
Forget about six-figures. And an average-sized online business. You’re going
to see the exact marketing funnels the real players in direct response marketing
use, and have used, to build massive fortunes. Seven, eight, and nine-figure
businesses. Giving them lifestyles that make even the most accomplished CEO’s
jealous. And, that’s just inside your bi-monthly MFU Blueprint Reports.
With each issue of the MFU Letter (which you get every other month in-between
issues of your Blueprint Reports), you get a transparent & raw peek into the
hardcore, no-holds-barred world of what the big boys in direct response marketing
are really doing to extract maximum cash from their customer lists with their
backend funnels.
You’ll be privy to stuff... up to this point... only the real insiders in the
direct response marketing world ever get to hear and see. Like, as if you were a
welcomed member at the weekly private cigar bar meetings with me and the genius
marketers pulling the strings behind the multi-million-dollar direct response
empires other marketers just hear about.
How insanely valuable do you think that will be for you?
Yeah, worth thousands, tens of thousands, likely even millions.
So, to say you should be wildly excited... well... that doesn’t really do
justice to the financial adventure you’ve begun now that you’re a Member of MFU.
Welcome to the Big Leagues, my friend. And enjoy the ride. You’re bank
account, lifestyle, and life as you know it is about to change forever!
Dig in...
